# Copilot Instructions

- Read `.github/instructions/architecture.md` before generating code.
- Read `.github/instructions/review-standard.md` before reviewing code.
- Prefer simple implementations.
- Avoid unnecessary abstractions.
- Follow the repository architecture.
- Keep Domain Models and API DTOs separate.
- Keep UI, API, Service, and Database responsibilities separated.
- Prefer deterministic, maintainable code over clever code.
